data.title: Florida’s Third Appeal Court reopens $80M lawsuit against Binance over Bitcoin theft
data.description:
Florida's Third Appeals Court has given a user who claims $80 million in Bitcoin was stolen from the Binance platform a chance to refile a state-level lawsuit.

data.title: Binance Updates Fiat Liquidity Provider Program with New USD Pairs
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has updated its Fiat Liquidity Provider Program, introducing USD pairs effective from 2025-12-04 08:00 (UTC). The program now includes two tiers, with Tier 1 requiring a Maker Volume Percentage of 0.5% and Tier 2 requiring 1.0%. The Maker Fee Rebate Rate is set at -0.005% for Tier 1 and -0.010% for Tier 2. The qualification review for these new tiers commenced on the same date, and liquidity providers will undergo weekly reviews based on a new performance review mechanism. Maker fee rebates will be updated weekly starting from 2025-12-09 00:00 (UTC), distributed based on the previous week’s Spot trading performance across selected fiat markets.

The Fiat Liquidity Provider Program encompasses various fiat markets, including USD, TRY, EUR, IDR, BRL, ZAR, PLN, UAH, ARS, RON, MXN, CZK, COP, and JPY. Each market has specific requirements for Maker Volume Percentage and corresponding Maker Fee Rebate Rates. For instance, USD pairs require a weekly Spot Maker Volume of 0.5% to qualify for a rebate rate of -0.005% in Tier 1 and 1.0% for -0.010% in Tier 2. The program incentivizes participants by offering maker rebates and standard VIP taker fees across eligible fiat markets, while unqualified markets incur zero maker fees.

To participate, users must have a 30-day trading volume exceeding 20,000,000 USDT equivalent on Binance Spot and Margin or other platforms, demonstrating quality liquidity providing strategies. Interested participants can apply for a trial period by submitting proof of trading volume. Binance reserves the right to amend or terminate the program due to regulatory changes, technical issues, or other significant reasons. The program is limited to specified fiat markets on Binance.com, with rebates settled in fiat currency regardless of the quote asset.

data.title: Bitcoin Asset Management Firm Twenty One to Begin Trading on NYSE
data.description: According to Odaily, Bitcoin Historian announced on the X platform that the Bitcoin asset management company Twenty One, backed by Cantor Fitzgerald and Jack Mallers, is set to commence trading on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) next week.

data.title: Coinbase CEO Warns Banks: Embrace Stablecoins or Become Obsolete
data.description:
Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong issued a stark warning to traditional financial institutions during the New York Times DealBook Summit on December 3, 2025. Speaking at a moment when the divide between Wall Street and the crypto industry is widening, Armstrong said banks that fail to adopt stablecoins and on-chain financial infrastructure risk being left behind.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/coinbase-ceo-warns-banks-embrace-stablecoins-or-become-obsolete/

data.title: Bitcoin Miners Face Challenges as Hash Revenue Declines
data.description: According to Odaily, Cointelegraph reported on the X platform that Bitcoin miners are shutting down their machines due to a decrease in hash revenue. The current hash income has dropped to approximately $35 per PH per day, while the total cost stands at around $44 per PH per day. This disparity is causing financial strain for miners, leading to the closure of operations.

data.title: Major Banks Test Crypto Tools While Lobbying Against Them

data.title: Malaysia Begins Aggressive Crackdown After Bitcoin Miners Steal $1.1 Billion in Electricity
data.description:
Malaysian authorities have launched one of their most aggressive crackdowns to date after uncovering that Bitcoin miners have stolen an estimated $1. 1 billion in electricity from the national grid since 2020. The revelations, confirmed on December 3, 2025, show that nearly 14,000 illegal mining sites siphoned power from state-owned utility Tenaga Nasional (TNB) over the […] The post Malaysia Begins Aggressive Crackdown After Bitcoin Miners Steal $1
source: https://www.ethnews.com/malaysia-begins-aggressive-crackdown-after-bitcoin-miners-steal-1-1-billion-in-electricity/

data.title: Ethereum Faces Key Resistance and Support Levels
data.description: According to BlockBeats, analyst @ali_charts has analyzed Ethereum's cost basis heatmap, identifying significant resistance and support levels. The current resistance for Ethereum is at $3,180, while the support level stands at $2,800. The heatmap indicates that approximately 2.6 million ETH have accumulated around these points, suggesting high holder density in these areas over the past few months.
